UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user's profile information within the application, excluding authentication credentials managed by an external system like Firebase. This entity stores details pertinent to the user's interaction with the store, such as their name and email for app-specific purposes.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity.

email.description: The user's email address, which is typically used as their login identifier in the external authentication system. This field should be unique.

name.description: The full name of the user, provided during registration.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user profile was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating the last time the user profile was updated.

ProjectFile.title: ProjectFile
ProjectFile.description: Represents a file uploaded by a user or admin related to a specific project.

id.description: Unique identifier for the file metadata document.

size.description: Size of the file in bytes.

uploadedBy.description: UID of the user who uploaded the file.

Product.title: Product
Product.description: Represents a single product available in the dropshipping store, including details for display, pricing, and categorisation. This entity supports dynamic showcases, recommendations, and sales features.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Product entity.

description.description: A detailed description of the product.

price.description: The standard selling price of the product.

discountPrice.description: The discounted price of the product, if any.

imageUrl.description: URL to the main image of the product.

categoryIds.description: References to Categories this product belongs to. (Relationship: Category N:N Product)

isFeatured.description: Flag indicating if the product should be displayed in featured sections or carousels.

isBestSeller.description: Flag indicating if the product is a 'Mais Vendido' (Best Seller).

averageRating.description: The calculated average rating based on customer reviews.

stockQuantity.description: The current quantity of the product available in stock.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the product was added to the store.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating the last time the product details were updated.

Category.title: Category
Category.description: Defines a product category for organizing and filtering products. This supports the interactive category grid and product categorization.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Category entity.

iconUrl.description: URL to an icon or image representing the category.

description.description: A brief description of the category.

slug.description: A URL-friendly identifier for the category, often derived from its name.

Testimonial.title: Testimonial
Testimonial.description: Stores customer testimonials used for social proof, including customer details and their feedback. This populates the animated social proof slider.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Testimonial entity.

authorName.description: The name of the customer who provided the testimonial.

authorCountry.description: The country of residence of the customer.

authorImageUrl.description: URL to a photo of the customer, for display in testimonials.

rating.description: An optional rating given by the customer (e.g., 1-5 stars).

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the testimonial was created.

Order.title: Order
Order.description: Records a customer's purchase, detailing the transaction, shipping information, and overall status. Essential for tracking sales and managing fulfillment.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Order entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who placed the order. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Order)

orderDate.description: The date and time when the order was placed.

totalAmount.description: The total monetary amount of the order, including shipping and taxes.

status.description: The current fulfillment status of the order (e.g., 'pending', 'processing', 'shipped', 'delivered', 'cancelled').

shippingAddress.description: The full shipping address for the order. This could be normalized into a separate Address entity if more complex address management is needed.

paymentMethod.description: The payment method used for the order (e.g., 'Stripe', 'PayPal').

transactionId.description: The unique transaction identifier provided by the payment gateway.

OrderItem.title: OrderItem
OrderItem.description: Details a specific product included within an order, capturing the quantity and price at the time of purchase. This entity forms the 'line items' of an order.

id.description: Unique identifier for the OrderItem entity.

orderId.description: Reference to the parent Order this item belongs to. (Relationship: Order 1:N OrderItem)

productId.description: Reference to the Product purchased. (Relationship: Product 1:N OrderItem - logistically, a product is associated with many order items)

quantity.description: The number of units of the product purchased.

priceAtPurchase.description: The price of the product at the moment of purchase, crucial for historical accuracy.

Cart.title: Cart
Cart.description: Represents a user's shopping cart, holding items they intend to purchase before checkout. This enables the dynamic cart counter.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Cart entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who owns this cart. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Cart)

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the cart was initially created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating the last time an item was added to or removed from the cart.

CartItem.title: CartItem
CartItem.description: Details a specific product and its quantity within a user's shopping cart.

id.description: Unique identifier for the CartItem entity.

cartId.description: Reference to the parent Cart this item belongs to. (Relationship: Cart 1:N CartItem)

productId.description: Reference to the Product added to the cart. (Relationship: Product 1:N CartItem - logistically, a product can be in many cart items)

quantity.description: The number of units of the product in the cart.

addedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the item was added to the cart.

NewsletterSubscription.title: NewsletterSubscription
NewsletterSubscription.description: Stores email addresses of users who have subscribed to the newsletter, supporting lead generation and marketing efforts.

id.description: Unique identifier for the NewsletterSubscription entity.

email.description: The email address of the subscriber. This should be unique.

subscribedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the email was subscribed.

isConfirmed.description: Flag indicating if the subscription has been confirmed (e.g., via double opt-in).

Review.title: Review
Review.description: Captures customer reviews and ratings for products, contributing to the 'estrelas de avaliação' and social proof.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Review entity.

productId.description: Reference to the Product being reviewed. (Relationship: Product 1:N Review)

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who submitted the review. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Review). Can be null if anonymous reviews are allowed.

rating.description: The star rating given by the user (e.g., an integer from 1 to 5).

comment.description: The textual comment provided by the user.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the review was submitted.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user.
